Functions
fza_mpd_fnc_setCurrentPage
Description

Sets the display on each page.

Parameters
_heli

the apache to show the correct values for.

_side

0 for left MPD, 1 for right MPD

_page

page name

_stateOverride

(Optional) modifications to apply to the config-defined state.

Returns

True if change was made, false if not.

Examples
_ret = [_heli 0, "fuel"] call fza_mpd_fnc_setCurrentPage;
// _ret => true
_ret = [_heli 0, "tsd"] call fza_mpd_fnc_setCurrentPage;
// _ret => false (left MPD can't show the TSD)
Author

mattysmith22
